title: The Fragrant Flower Blooms With Dignity
titleRomaji: Kaoru Hana wa Rin to Saku
titleEnglish: The Fragrant Flower Blooms With Dignity
synonyms: Kaoru und Rin: So nah und doch so fern
Kaoru i Rin. Rozkwitając z tobą
The Fragrant Flower Blooms With Dignity - Kaoru & Rin
synopsis: This story takes place in a particular town with two infamous schools in constant dispute: Chidori High, a boys' school predominantly attended by low-class students with damning grades, and its neighbor Kikyo Girls' High, with most of its female students coming from wealthy and prestigious families. One day, high school second-year Rintaro Tsumugi, a fierce-looking but gentle-minded student at Chidori, is helping at his family's patisserie when he encounters a female customer by the name of Kaoruko Waguri. Rintaro enjoys his time with Kaoruko, as she doesn't judge him for his appearance, but this blissful peace is quickly disturbed when Rintaro makes the discovery that Kaoruko is actually a student at Kikyo. This revelation marks the beginning of the two's strenuous tale, as they fight against the limitations placed upon them by their schools and surroundings in an attempt to find their own path! (Source: K Manga)

title: Mimi's Tales of Terror
synonyms: Las historias de fantasmas de Mimi
synopsis: University student Mimi and her boyfriend Naoto encounter one chilling mystery after another. There’s the enigmatic neighbor woman dressed in black from head to toe—but if she’s so odd, why does it seems like there are many others like her? Then, whose eyes track Mimi’s movements from the cemetery next door? And why does a bizarre red circle drawn on a basement wall change with each passing day? Nine scary stories that really happened, drawn from the famed collection of urban legends Shin Mimibukuro (New Earmuffs), and adapted into manga by horror genius Junji Ito! Chapter 1: On the Utility Pole Chapter 2: The Woman Next Door Chapter 3: Rustling in the Grass Chapter 4: Grave Placement Chapter 5: Seashore Chapter 6: Just the Two of Us Chapter 7: Scarlet Circle Chapter 8: Sign in the Field Chapter 9: Monster Prop (Source: VIZ Media)

title: Dustland
synopsis: In the Utsusemi District of Toaru City—where Suzuran All-Boys High School towers over the landscape—a young boy named Asada Hibari has moved into the Nakahara Apartments, a place better known as "The Ghost Projects." Still trapped in the shadow of his mother's death, Hibari remains unable to escape his suffocating loneliness. However, a chance meeting with Kobayashi Sanzou, a resident of the same building, begins to lead his youth toward something hotter and more irreplaceable than anything he’s ever known!! (Source: Akita Shoten, translated)

title: Huang Yue
synopsis: To pay off his debts, he dresses as a woman, only to accidentally cross paths with a gang’s top hitman—and, through a series of misunderstandings, ends up becoming his partner. Forced to live together, this unlikely pair finds themselves caught in a tug-of-war between lies and growing feelings… (Source: Bilibili, translated)

title: Ru Hai
synopsis: Once the closest of lovers, Ji Lingyue and Lan Wu, were forced apart by their identities as human and demon. Lan Wu, the mermaid princess, chose to leave Ji Lingyue, subjecting her to countless days and nights of agony. When they reunited at a cultivation gathering, Ji Lingyue swore never to let Lan Wu leave again.

title: Renzao Tiwen 36.7℃
synopsis: Su, born in prison, has always wanted to see the "crow" from the story her mother told her. On the day she was going to be secretly executed, Gill, an artificial intelligence with a database of everything outside the prison, was thrown into prison for a test run. Su develops a special feeling for Gill, not caring whether her words are programmed or self-conscious, and not trying to tell if she has human emotions. Unable to distinguish her own human feelings... in this small cell, the lonely Su got her first doll--she met a "person" who could comfort her soul.

titleNative: 断頭台に消えた伝説の悪女、二度目の人生ではガリ勉地味眼鏡になって平穏を望む
synonyms: The Legendary Wicked Woman Wants a Peaceful Second Life as a Boring Studious Girl
synopsis: "Don’t you think it’s stupid to be so madly in love?" Princess Letitia is due to be executed by guillotine, for the terrible crimes she committed trying to win back her fiancee's love. However, just when she thought she was dead, she was returned back in time for a second chance at life. "I won’t fall in love in my new life. I’m going to live peacefully by becoming a sober, hard-working student with glasses!” But one day, her glasses slip off and Camilo, the school's superstar, sees her true face. Then, for some reason, Camilo begins to dote on her in a tidal wave of affection…!? (Source: Comic Days, translated)

title: Starting on Hard Mode: God Levels, Got Problems
titleRomaji: Level Count Stop kara Hajimaru, Kamisama-teki Isekai Life: Saikyou Status ni Tensei Shita no de Suki ni Ikimasu
titleEnglish: Starting on Hard Mode: God Levels, Got Problems
titleNative: レベルカンストから始まる、神様的異世界ライフ ~最強ステータスに転生したので好きに生きます~
synopsis: After waking to find himself reincarnated and his past-life memories erased, Merlin is looking forward to a life of ease—but his reality is anything but easy! “Blessed” with god-tier stats and divine good looks, he quickly discovers that a normal life is next to impossible for someone who's constantly mistaken for a deity. It doesn't help that being OP means he can barely lift a finger without causing mass destruction! Then there's the issue of all the girls who desperately need his help. Too overpowered and too overrun with damsels in distress—will Merlin ever get to kick back and enjoy his new life? (Source: J-Novel Club)

synopsis: By chance, Wu Mian obtained a mask that forces absolute obedience on other people. But even then, he couldn't muster up the courage to confess to the girl he had a crush on. Until an incident that turned his life completely upside down... (Source: QQ, translated)

titleNative: やり直し公女の魔導革命～処刑された悪役令嬢は滅びる家門を立てなおす～
synopsis: Mizuki Miyahara was living her best life, working as a robotics engineer. Ever since she was a child, she had recurring dreams about a lady Leticia, who was falsely accused and executed. One day, she had the same dream as usual, and then she was killed in a traffic accident. She found herself reincarnated as a young Letitia, before her execution. In order to avoid the terrible fate from her dreams, she tries to make a new life. First of all, she must find a way to avoid an engagement with the crown prince, who may be the one behind the plot....... (Source: Hifumishobo, translated)

synopsis: After helping a woman who fainted on the street, I discovered that her daughters are the popular and beautiful twin girls in my class — Yuzuki and Haruka Kotobuki! Before I knew it, both of them seem to have developed feelings for me…? A sweet school harem romantic comedy with two unattainable beauties begins with a simple act of kindness! (Source: Comic Growl, translated)

title: Hinmin, Seihitsu, Daifugou
synopsis: Shiragaki Seiya, a high school student and the daughter of a mangaka, is anxious to become financially independent so as to relieve the burden on her single mother. One day while on the way to school, she has an encounter with "The Spirit of the Chest, Aurelia de Medici," and thereafter finds herself thrown headfirst into a no-holds-barred otherworldly battle revolving around money.

title: My Secret Affection
titleRomaji: Kimi no Koto ga Suki de Ienai.
titleNative: 君のことが好きで言えない。
synonyms: No puedo decirte que te quiero
Ich darf nicht sagen, dass ich dich liebe
synopsis: It’s been thirty years since meteorites from space turned everyone on the Earth gay. In a world where heterosexuality no longer exists, Takanashi Kazusa falls for her childhood friend Ayumu–a boy. Though she’s doing everything she can to act normal whenever they hang out, her love for Ayumu is growing stronger by the day. How much longer can she hide her secret feelings? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

一番遠くて、近いあいつ。～君に恋をするなんて、ありえないはずだった～
synopsis: Yasutaka Iijima, a boy wearing glasses, sits in the corner of the classroom and wants nothing to do with Ema Kitaoka, a popular gal in the same class. However, after a chance meeting at the school camping trip, they started talking with each other, but only outside of school. They are both unsure of each other's "true feelings." (Source: Comic Howl, translated)

title: Kyou Kara Tsukaeru Isekai Renai Manual
titleRomaji: Kyou Kara Tsukaeru Isekai Renai Manual
titleNative: 今日から使える異世界恋愛マニュアル
synonyms: A Love Manual You Can Use From Today
synopsis: Just as Haruchika Isezaki was confessing to his first love, he is suddenly summoned to another world. His summoner, the goddess Clementine, gives him an unusual mission: to make seven girls, destined to become the mothers of the next generation of heroes, fall in love again. These girls have lost their ability to love due to a curse cast by the Demon Lord. In other words, Haruchika must convince them all to fall in love with him! To return to his world and hear the answer to his confession, Haruchika accepts this mission and sets out to save another world through love. Having mastered the art of romance through his study of female psychology, his journey to fulfill their first loves begins — a romantic tale about saving another world through the power of love! (Source: Nico Nico Seiga, translated)

title: Shakunetsu no Takkyuu Musume: Reburn!!
synopsis: Koyori is a new transfer student looking for excitement, and Agari is a girl who devotes herself to her sport. Their encounter will create a fiery whirlwind in the world of junior high table tennis! Will Koyori and her team be able to grab a ticket to the nationals at the Tokyo tournament? Hearts pounding! Love at full speed! The story about girls' youth, previous adapted into anime, has been rekindled! (Source: Takeshobo, translated) Note: A sequel to Shakunetsu no Takkyuu Musume , originally announced in a special chapter called Shakunetsu no Idol Musume on February 24th 2023.

title: Ringoku kara Kita Yome ga Kawaisugite Doushiyou.
titleRomaji: Ringoku kara Kita Yome ga Kawaisugite Doushiyou.
titleNative: 隣国から来た嫁が可愛すぎてどうしよう。
synonyms: My Wife from the Neighboring Country Is So Cute, I Don't Know What to Do!
鄰國來的新娘太可愛了該怎麼辦？
synopsis: With his brash personality and muscular physique, and his fierce presence fighting against his country's foes, Salyu is known as the “Winter Bear of Tidros." Until one day when he finds himself engaged to Citron, a young lady whose betrothal was broken off in a neighboring country! Starting with a kiss on the forehead, he fidgets awkwardly around this unfamiliar woman. Her smile makes his heart race, and glimpses of her cleavage leave him flustered. Salyu's mind runs wild with naughty thoughts, pushing his sanity to the brink! This chaotic, heart-pounding romantic fantasy comedy begins — with his inner thoughts coming through loud and clear! (Source: Comic Pash, translated)
